ValidationRule.description: A Term start date must be before the end date of that term
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR(IP_Term1StartDate__c >= IP_Term1EndDate__c, IP_Term2StartDate__c >= IP_Term2EndDate__c, IP_Term3StartDate__c >= IP_Term3EndDate__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: A term start date must be before the end date of that term
